name: harness-direct-api
description: Direct-API harness — covers the three non-binary providers (OpenAI-compatible, Gemini, Anthropic API). Single register entry exposes `.stream` (OpenAI-compat) plus sibling `.streamGemini` and `.streamAnthropic` so the dispatcher in chat.ts can pick the right variant by model family. Implementation stays at bridge/tools/stream.ts because the streamers share the tool-loop infrastructure (handleHashTool, btw drainage, image-block handling) with non-harness consumers. Disabling this module makes /v1/stream/ throw for any external/direct-anthropic-routed request.
